name: Earned Income Tax Credit for U.S. Possessions

eligibility.description: Residents of U.S. possessions with earned income who meet local requirements for the reformed or mirror-code Earned Income Tax Credit.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a refundable earned income tax credit to residents of Puerto Rico, Virgin Islands, Guam, Northern Mariana Islands, and American Samoa, mirrored or matched by federal payments.
